walkMode: Enable walk mode (LLM token extraction; requires API key)
walkHint: Turn on walk mode to significantly improve token extraction quality.
baseUrl: API base URL (optional; defaults to OpenAI)
privacyNote: Input is turned into tokens locally. Walk mode sends only the current input chunk to your API for extraction—not your full corpus. The bird responds after about 5 seconds of idle typing.
popupHint: Type in a field; after ~5s idle the bird replies with chirps and learned words.
